session.assistant:
## All PR Comments Addressed
| Metric | Value | |--------|-------| | Total comments | 2 | | Pre-existing (auto-resolved) | 0 | | Actionable (code changes) | 2 | | Batches | 1 | | Commits | 1 |
All review threads resolved.
**Change summary:** Narrowed `except Exception` to `except RuntimeError` in the best-effort dispatch metadata block of `incremental_dispatch.py`. The `write_dispatch_metadata` function documents `RuntimeError` as its exception type, consistent with the codebase convention for gateway calls.
**Next steps:** 1. Push changes: `git push` or `gt ss` 2. Wait for CI to pass 3. Request re-review if needed
